products.name: UxV Antennas
products.descriptor: High-performance antenna range for UxV payload, data-link, and C2 applications

evidence.snippet: As the demand for Unmanned Vehicle Systems (UxVs) increases, so does the need for a wider range of antennas for payloads, data communications systems, command and control. Performance requirements and cost criteria are an important consideration when selecting the antenna.

products.name: TX160
products.descriptor: Small-form-factor HEVC/DVB-T COFDM transmitter handling up to UHD 60fps

products.name: Custom Design
products.descriptor: Bespoke antenna design and in-house manufacture service for custom frequency or mounting requirements

evidence.snippet:
Custom Design
=============
Overview
--------
Videosys offers a bespoke antenna design service.  Be that a new design for a special frequency requirement or specialised mounting arrangements, Videosys has the expertise to design and manufacture in house to short time scales.
